description: Initialize Next.js 14 frontend project with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and build the premium landing page with all sections, animations, and dashboard skeleton pages
steps: Initialize Next.js 14 project in frontend/ with: pnpm create next-app@latest frontend --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir=false --import-alias='@/*' --use-pnpm (or manually create package.json and config files)
Install additional dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority (for shadcn-style utilities)
Configure tailwind.config.ts with custom colors (primary: #1F4E79, accent: #10B981), Inter font, and animation utilities

Create frontend/app/globals.css with Tailwind directives, Inter font import, CSS mesh gradient animations, floating particle effects (pure CSS keyframes), glassmorphism utility classes, and dark/light mode CSS variables
Create frontend/lib/utils.ts with cn() helper using clsx + tailwind-merge
Create frontend/app/layout.tsx as root layout with Inter font, metadata for GeoUMKM Intelligence v4.0, dark mode support via class strategy
Create frontend/components/landing/Navbar.tsx - sticky glassmorphism navbar with logo, nav links, and CTA button

Create frontend/components/landing/HeroSection.tsx - animated mesh gradient background, floating CSS particles, gradient text headline in Indonesian ('Platform Intelijen UMKM Terdepan'), English subtitle, animated stats counters using framer-motion useInView + animate

Create frontend/components/landing/FeaturesSection.tsx - glassmorphism cards with hover tilt effects (CSS transform + framer-motion), icons from lucide-react, showcasing: Credit Scoring AI, Location Intelligence, Clustering & Segmentation, Policy Simulation, AI Chat Assistant, Executive Reports
Create frontend/components/landing/ForWhoSection.tsx - tabbed interface (Bank/Pemerintah/Investor) with animated tab switching, each tab shows relevant features and benefits with icons
Create frontend/components/landing/TechStackSection.tsx - animated tech stack badges/icons with hover effects, showing: Next.js, Azure, XGBoost, Python, TypeScript, OpenAI
Create frontend/components/landing/PricingSection.tsx - 3 tier pricing cards (Starter/Professional/Enterprise) with glassmorphism, hover scale effects, feature lists per tier, in IDR currency
Create frontend/components/landing/Footer.tsx - footer with links, copyright, social links
Create frontend/app/(landing)/page.tsx - compose all landing page sections with framer-motion scroll animations (fadeInUp on intersection), smooth section transitions

Create frontend/components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx - responsive sidebar with navigation items (Overview, Credit Scoring, Location Intelligence, Clustering, Policy Simulation, Reports, Settings), collapsible on mobile, active state indicator
Create frontend/components/dashboard/DashboardLayout.tsx - layout wrapper with sidebar + main content area + floating AI chat button
Create frontend/components/chat/FloatingChatPanel.tsx - floating chat panel component (UI only), expandable/collapsible, chat input area, placeholder messages
Create frontend/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx - dashboard layout using DashboardLayout component

Create placeholder pages for all dashboard routes: (dashboard)/overview/page.tsx, (dashboard)/credit-scoring/page.tsx, (dashboard)/location-intelligence/page.tsx, (dashboard)/clustering/page.tsx, (dashboard)/policy-simulation/page.tsx, (dashboard)/reports/page.tsx, (dashboard)/settings/page.tsx - each with title and 'Coming Soon' card with relevant icon
Create frontend/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx and (auth)/register/page.tsx - simple auth page placeholders with form UI
Create frontend/next.config.js with output: 'standalone' for Azure deployment
Ensure all components are responsive (mobile-first) and support dark/light mode
acceptance_criteria: pnpm install completes without errors in frontend/
pnpm build completes without TypeScript or build errors
Landing page has: navbar, hero with animations, features cards, for-who tabs, tech stack, pricing, footer
Dashboard has: sidebar navigation, all 7 placeholder pages, floating chat panel UI
Auth pages exist with login and register forms
Dark/light mode CSS variables are configured
Framer motion animations are used for scroll reveals and counters
CSS-only mesh gradient and particle effects in hero section (no heavy JS animation libraries)
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/geoumkm-smart-3/frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
Verify the build output shows all routes compiled successfully
